proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ECOG performance status is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative association: each additional ECOG point predicts a decrease in pfs_months).
Stage IV disease (stage_iv = 1) is associated with shorter pfs_months than non-stage IV (negative effect).

analyses.result_summary: OLS regression pfs_months ~ ecog_ps. Each unit of ecog_ps decreased mean pfs by -1.190 months (p=0.00e+00).
OLS regression pfs_months ~ stage_iv. Stage IV patients had pfs -1.352 months shorter (p=0.00e+00).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher serum albumin_g_dl predicts longer pfs_months (positive effect).
Higher LDH (ldh_u_l) predicts shorter pfs_months (negative effect).
Higher CRP (crp_mg_l) predicts shorter pfs_months (negative effect).
Higher neutrophil-to-lymphocyte ratio (nlr) predicts shorter pfs_months (negative effect).
Higher 6-month weight loss (weight_loss_pct_6mo) predicts shorter pfs_months (negative effect).

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ albumin_g_dl. Per +1 g/dL albumin, pfs increased by 0.465 months (p=3.25e-115). Strong positive effect.
OLS pfs_months ~ ldh_u_l. Per +1 U/L LDH, pfs decreased by -0.00032 months (p=0.013). Small but significant negative.
OLS pfs_months ~ crp_mg_l. Coefficient -0.0020 months/(mg/L), p=0.065. Direction negative but not significant in unadjusted model.
OLS pfs_months ~ nlr. Coefficient 0.0052 months per unit (p=0.290). Direction unexpectedly slightly positive and not significant.
OLS pfs_months ~ weight_loss_pct_6mo. Per +1% weight loss, pfs decreased by -0.0730 months (p=2.21e-167). Strong negative effect.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Right-sided primary tumors (right_sided_primary = 1) have shorter pfs_months than left-sided (negative effect of right-sidedness).
Older age (age_years) is associated with shorter pfs_months in this CRC cohort (expected negative effect).
Female patients (sex_female = 1) have different mean pfs_months than males.

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ right_sided_primary. Right-sided patients had pfs -0.305 months shorter (p=5.23e-46).
OLS pfs_months ~ age_years. Per +1 year, pfs increased by 0.1765 months (p=0.00e+00). Direction OPPOSITE to expected: older patients have LONGER pfs in this cohort.
OLS pfs_months ~ sex_female. Coefficient -0.0060 months (p=0.770). No detectable sex effect.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Liver metastases (liver_mets = 1) predict shorter pfs_months (negative effect).
Bone metastases (bone_mets = 1) predict shorter pfs_months.
Pleural effusion predicts shorter pfs_months.
Adrenal mets, contralateral lung mets, and pericardial effusion each predict shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ liver_mets. Coefficient -0.0188 (p=0.516). NS — surprisingly no detectable liver-met penalty.
OLS pfs_months ~ bone_mets. Coefficient 0.0313 (p=0.221). NS, direction slightly positive.
OLS pfs_months ~ pleural_effusion. Coefficient -0.0516 (p=0.072). NS.
OLS for adrenal_mets (0.0579, p=0.090), contralateral_lung_mets (-0.0465, p=0.142), pericardial_effusion (-0.0790, p=0.130). All NS.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher CEA (cea_ng_ml) predicts shorter pfs_months (negative effect, established CRC tumor marker).
Higher alkaline phosphatase predicts shorter pfs_months.
Lower hemoglobin predicts shorter pfs_months (positive effect of hemoglobin).
Higher calcium and platelets each have measurable associations with pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ cea_ng_ml. Per +1 ng/mL CEA, pfs decreased by -0.00535 months (p=3.13e-17). Significant negative.
OLS pfs_months ~ alkaline_phosphatase_u_l. Per +1 U/L, pfs decreased by -0.000595 months (p=0.004). Small but significant negative.
OLS pfs_months ~ hemoglobin_g_dl. Coefficient -0.0101 (p=0.078). Direction unexpectedly slightly negative; not significant.
OLS calcium_mg_dl coef -0.0331 (p=0.106); platelets_k_ul coef 0.000050 (p=0.733). Both NS.

proposed_hypotheses.text: BRAF V600E mutation (braf_v600e = 1) is associated with shorter pfs_months (poor prognostic marker in CRC).
KRAS mutation (kras_mutation = 1) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
NRAS mutation (nras_mutation = 1) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
MSI-high status (msi_high = 1) is associated with longer pfs_months (favorable prognosis).
HER2 amplification (her2_amplified = 1) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
TP53 mutation, PIK3CA mutation, NTRK fusion each have main-effect associations with pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ braf_v600e. Coefficient -0.228 months (p=3.69e-06). Significantly worse PFS in BRAF V600E.
OLS pfs_months ~ kras_mutation. Coefficient -0.327 months (p=8.53e-56). KRAS-mut significantly worse PFS.
OLS pfs_months ~ nras_mutation. Coefficient 0.221 months (p=0.0002). Direction OPPOSITE expected: NRAS-mut had slightly LONGER pfs.
OLS pfs_months ~ msi_high. Coefficient -0.0192 (p=0.682). NS — no detectable favorable main effect of MSI-high in this cohort.
OLS pfs_months ~ her2_amplified. Coefficient -0.0556 (p=0.354). NS.
OLS tp53_mutation coef -0.0183 (p=0.375); pik3ca_mutation coef -0.0243 (p=0.527); ntrk_fusion coef 0.0399 (p=0.783). All NS.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cetuximab (treatment_cetuximab = 1) overall improves pfs_months versus no cetuximab (positive main effect).
Bevacizumab improves pfs_months overall.
Pembrolizumab improves pfs_months overall.
Encorafenib improves pfs_months overall.
Trastuzumab+tucatinib improves pfs_months overall.
Regorafenib improves pfs_months overall.

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_cetuximab: coef -0.0380 (p=0.089). NS overall, direction slightly negative.
OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_bevacizumab: coef -0.0191 (p=0.354). NS overall.
OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_pembrolizumab: coef 0.0052 (p=0.855). NS overall.
OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_encorafenib: coef 0.0054 (p=0.873). NS overall.
OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib: coef -0.0436 (p=0.246). NS overall.
OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_regorafenib: coef 0.972 months (p=0.00e+00). LARGE positive effect — regorafenib users had ~+0.97 mo PFS.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cetuximab benefit on pfs_months is larger in KRAS-wild-type (kras_mutation = 0) than KRAS-mutant (positive treatment×KRAS=0 interaction = negative coefficient on cet:kras_mutation).
Cetuximab benefit is larger when both KRAS and NRAS are wild-type (RAS-WT) than when either is mutated.

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_cetuximab * kras_mutation. Interaction term cet:kras coef 0.0196 (p=0.665). Cetuximab in KRAS-WT subgroup: Δ=-0.0475 mo (p=0.122). Cetuximab in KRAS-mut: Δ=-0.0279 mo (p=0.376). No interaction detected — cetuximab does not selectively help KRAS-WT in this cohort.

OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_cetuximab * ras_wt (where ras_wt = KRAS=0 & NRAS=0). Interaction coef -0.0169 (p=0.707). Cetuximab in RAS-WT: Δ=-0.0474 mo (p=0.132). Cetuximab in RAS-mut: Δ=-0.0305 mo (p=0.324). NS interaction — the canonical RAS-WT predictive signal for cetuximab was NOT recovered here.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cetuximab benefit is larger in left-sided primaries (right_sided_primary = 0) than right-sided (positive cet × left interaction = negative coefficient on cet:right_sided_primary).
Cetuximab benefit is concentrated in the canonical favorable subgroup: left-sided AND RAS-WT (three-way interaction).

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_cetuximab * right_sided_primary. Interaction coef 0.0256 (p=0.583). Cetuximab in left-sided: Δ=-0.0494 mo (p=0.086). Cetuximab in right-sided: Δ=-0.0237 mo (p=0.490). No side × cetuximab interaction detected.

Three-way OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_cetuximab * right_sided_primary * ras_wt. Triple interaction coef -0.0066 (p=0.944). Cetuximab in the canonical favorable subgroup (left-sided RAS-WT): Δ=-0.0616 mo (p=0.134). Cetuximab in unfavorable (right-sided OR RAS-mut): Δ=-0.0319 mo (p=0.213). No selective benefit detected.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Pembrolizumab benefit on pfs_months is concentrated in MSI-high patients (large positive treatment × msi_high interaction).

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_pembrolizumab * msi_high. Interaction coef 0.0020 (p=0.988). Pembrolizumab in MSI-high: Δ=0.0071 mo (p=0.957). Pembrolizumab in MSS: Δ=0.0051 mo (p=0.861). The canonical pembrolizumab × MSI-H interaction was NOT detected.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Encorafenib benefit on pfs_months is larger in BRAF V600E-mutant patients (negative interaction not expected; positive subgroup effect expected).

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_encorafenib * braf_v600e. Interaction coef -0.1413 (p=0.376). Encorafenib in BRAF-mut: Δ=-0.1288 mo (p=0.329). Encorafenib in BRAF-WT: Δ=0.0125 mo (p=0.718). Interaction NS; the expected BRAF-V600E-selective benefit of encorafenib was not detected.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Trastuzumab+tucatinib benefit on pfs_months is concentrated in HER2-amplified patients (positive treatment × her2_amplified interaction).

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib * her2_amplified. Interaction coef 0.0625 (p=0.778). T+T in HER2-amp: Δ=0.0170 mo (p=0.934). T+T in HER2-neg: Δ=-0.0455 mo (p=0.232). NS — canonical HER2-selective benefit was not detected.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Bevacizumab effect on pfs_months differs by tumor side (treatment × right_sided_primary interaction).
Adjusting for ECOG, stage, albumin, LDH, age, CRP, bevacizumab still has no detectable effect on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_bevacizumab * right_sided_primary. Interaction coef -0.0221 (p=0.608). Main bev coef -0.0123 (p=0.632). NS interaction.
Multivariable OLS adjusting for ECOG, albumin, LDH, stage_iv, age, CRP. Adjusted bevacizumab coef 0.0064 (p=0.486). Still NS — no measurable PFS effect of bevacizumab.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Regorafenib confers a substantial PFS benefit overall (positive effect that holds after adjusting for prior_lines_of_therapy).
Higher prior_lines_of_therapy is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_regorafenib + prior_lines_of_therapy. Adjusted regorafenib coef 0.972 mo (p=0.00e+00). Robust large positive effect persists.
OLS pfs_months ~ prior_lines_of_therapy: coef 0.0078 (p=0.388). NS, direction unexpectedly slightly positive. After adjustment for regorafenib: 0.0084 (p=0.346). NS.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher symptom-burden grades (fatigue_grade, pain_nrs, dyspnea_grade, cough_grade, appetite_loss_grade) each predict shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS univariate per symptom: fatigue_grade -0.0017 (p=0.853); pain_nrs -0.0023 (p=0.547); dyspnea_grade -0.0092 (p=0.312); cough_grade -0.0161 (p=0.087); appetite_loss_grade -0.0002 (p=0.983). All NS, all directions tiny — symptom grades are not detectable PFS predictors here.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Comorbidities — chronic_kidney_disease, heart_failure, COPD, atrial_fibrillation, autoimmune_disease, prior_malignancy, depression_anxiety_diagnosis — are individually associated with pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS univariate for each comorbidity: e.g., chronic_kidney_disease coef 0.0319 (p=0.313); heart_failure 0.0008 (p=0.982); copd 0.0055 (p=0.811); atrial_fibrillation -0.0594 (p=0.119); depression_anxiety_diagnosis -0.0516 (p=0.053); prior_malignancy -0.0444 (p=0.160). All NS. No comorbidity reached α=0.05.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Black, Hispanic, Asian, and 'other' race/ethnicity each have shorter pfs_months than white patients (disparity hypothesis).
Medicaid and uninsured patients have shorter pfs_months than privately insured patients.
Rural residence is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ C(race_ethnicity, ref='white'): black coef -0.0423 (p=0.189); hispanic -0.0010 (p=0.972); asian -0.0099 (p=0.820); other 0.0914 (p=0.220). All NS — no race/ethnicity disparity in PFS detected.

OLS pfs_months ~ C(insurance_type, ref='private'): medicaid -0.0533 (p=0.094); uninsured -0.0816 (p=0.129); medicare -0.0187 (p=0.410). All NS at alpha=0.05; medicaid trend toward shorter PFS (p~0.09) but did not reach significance.
OLS pfs_months ~ rural_residence: coef 0.0245 (p=0.338). NS.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among the 27 SNPs (snp_rs*) included as features, none has a meaningful main-effect association with pfs_months once multiple-comparisons are accounted for; ≤5% are expected to cross α=0.05 by chance.

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ snp for each of 27 SNPs. Three crossed α=0.05 unadjusted: snp_rs1801131 (coef -0.0493, p=0.027); snp_rs1050828 (coef 0.0917, p=0.015); snp_rs1801197 (coef -0.0493, p=0.047). 3/27 ≈ 11% nominal hits — only marginally above the 5% expected under the global null; with Bonferroni (α/27=0.0019) NONE survive. Consistent with SNPs being noise.

proposed_hypotheses.text: BMI is associated with pfs_months.
Smoking pack-years is associated with pfs_months.
Education years is associated with pfs_months (socioeconomic surrogate).

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ bmi: coef -0.0029 (p=0.164). NS.
OLS pfs_months ~ smoking_pack_years: coef 0.000047 (p=0.913). NS.
OLS pfs_months ~ education_years: coef 0.0033 (p=0.337). NS.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for ECOG, albumin, LDH, and stage IV, the canonical three-way cetuximab × ras_wt × left_sided benefit is detectable (negative coefficient on cetuximab in unfavorable subgroups, positive in left-sided RAS-WT).

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS with full three-way cetuximab × ras_wt × left_sided. cetuximab main -0.0114 (p=0.818); cet:ras_wt -0.0289 (p=0.664); cet:left 0.0047 (p=0.939); cet:ras_wt:left_sided -0.0410 (p=0.620). All terms NS even with adjustment — no biomarker-defined cetuximab benefit in this dataset.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for ECOG, albumin, LDH, stage IV, age, the pembrolizumab × MSI-high interaction becomes detectable.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS pfs_months ~ pembro * msi_high + prognostic covariates. pembro coef -0.0007 (p=0.956); pembro:msi_high coef 0.0433 (p=0.448); msi_high coef -0.0160 (p=0.479). All NS even with adjustment.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for ECOG, albumin, LDH, stage IV, BRAF V600E remains an independent negative prognostic marker, and encorafenib's BRAF V600E selectivity becomes detectable.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS pfs_months ~ encorafenib * braf_v600e + prognostic covariates. enco main 0.0228 (p=0.457); enco:braf_v600e -0.2525 (p=0.073); braf_v600e main -0.1673 (p=0.0003). BRAF remains a robust negative prognostic marker (~−0.17 mo, significant). The encorafenib × BRAF interaction trends toward the expected direction (encorafenib better in BRAF-mut) but does not reach significance (p≈0.07).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for ECOG, albumin, LDH, stage IV, trastuzumab+tucatinib's HER2-amplification selectivity becomes detectable.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS pfs_months ~ trastuzumab_tucatinib * her2_amplified + prognostic covariates. T+T main -0.0416 (p=0.218); T+T:her2 0.1735 (p=0.375); her2 main -0.0829 (p=0.133). All NS — interaction direction is positive (in favor of HER2-amp benefit) but underpowered.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A multivariable OLS combining the prognostic main effects identified earlier (ECOG, stage IV, albumin, LDH, weight loss, age, CEA, right-side, BRAF, KRAS, MSI-high, liver_mets, bone_mets, CRP, NLR, plus the six treatments and the four hypothesised treatment×biomarker interactions) explains substantial variance in pfs_months and confirms the directions identified in earlier iterations.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted multivariable OLS (R²=0.859). Significant terms (p<0.05): ecog_ps coef -1.171; stage_iv -1.361; albumin_g_dl 0.469; ldh_u_l -0.00042; weight_loss_pct_6mo -0.0761; age_years 0.1758; cea_ng_ml -0.00500; right_sided_primary -0.286; braf_v600e -0.356; kras_mutation -0.360; treatment_regorafenib 0.943. None of the four putatively predictive biomarker × treatment interactions (ras_wt:cetuximab, msi_high:pembrolizumab, braf_v600e:encorafenib, her2_amplified:trastuzumab_tucatinib) reached significance in the adjusted model.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A composite 'high systemic inflammation' phenotype (NLR > 3 AND albumin < 3.5 g/dL) is associated with substantially shorter pfs_months even when each biomarker alone barely reaches significance.
Regorafenib's PFS benefit is larger in heavily pretreated patients (prior_lines_of_therapy ≥ 2) than in less-pretreated patients (positive treatment × heavily_pretreated interaction).
Even within MSI-high (the canonical responder subgroup), pembrolizumab does not produce a detectable PFS gain in this cohort.

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ high_inflam (NLR>3 & albumin<3.5). Coef -0.342 months (p=1.85e-27). High-inflammation phenotype confirmed as a strong negative prognostic.
OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_regorafenib * heavily_pretreated. Interaction coef 0.0271 (p=0.607). Interaction NS — regorafenib's benefit is uniform across pretreatment depth.
Welch t-test in MSI-high subgroup (~5% of cohort). Pembrolizumab Δpfs=0.0071 months (p=0.957). NS — no detectable benefit in the canonical responder subgroup.
